problem: How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve How does gravity behave at quantum scales — quantum gravity unresolved by activating at the systems level.
